steps.title: Map the passage order
steps.content: The text first introduces Julian Reeves's collaborative spoken word album with producer Marta Ellis. It then explains the production approach: Reeves's spoken words are combined with fragmented audio elements and music to convey experiences of sound.

steps.title: Include the critics' view
steps.content: Choice B invents a standout poem. Choice C says the text gives biographies and speculates, which it does not. Choice D says the text explains the extent of collaboration on each poem, also not stated. The remaining choice accurately describes the structure: project introduction, production approach, then a critical response. The answer is A.
